mapper.sql: id, article_no, title, category, summary, tags, author, publish_date, view_count, status, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tbl_knowledge_article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_knowledge_article ( article_no, title, category, summary, tags, author, publish_date, view_count, status, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{articleNo}, #{title}, #{category}, #{summary}, #{tags}, #{author}, #{publishDate}, #{viewCount}, #{status}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_knowledge_article
update_time = NOW(), article_no = #{articleNo}, title = #{title}, category = #{category}, summary = #{summary}, tags = #{tags}, author = #{author}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, view_count = #{viewCount}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_knowledge_article SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT article_no FROM tbl_knowledge_article WHERE article_no LIKE 'KB-%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
